messages.text: A pillar of holy fire clings to you and keeps burning, searing away at your flesh.
{name} is wreathed in a clinging pillar of holy fire.
The clinging holy fire sears deeper into your flesh.
The holy fire gutters out and the searing eases.
The holy fire wreathing {name} gutters out.
{name} is branded with a clinging pillar of holy fire that will not go out.
